---
name: Improve a template
about: Propose changes to people/_template/ or projects/_template/
title: "template: <one-line summary>"
labels: enhancement, template
---

## Which template?

- [ ] `people/_template/profile.md`
- [ ] `projects/_template/notes.md`
- [ ] Both

## What change do you propose?

<Describe the field/section to add/remove/rename. Include rationale.>

## Backward compatibility

Existing user clones already have profiles using the current template. Will your change:

- [ ] Add new optional fields (safe — old profiles still work)
- [ ] Rename fields (breaking — users have to update manually)
- [ ] Remove fields (breaking)

If breaking, propose a migration note in the PR description.

## Example

<Show a "before" and "after" snippet.>

## Privacy check

- [ ] All examples use placeholder names (`张三`, `Alice`, `Acme Corp`)
- [ ] No real-looking emails, phone numbers, or WeChat IDs
